message:
chore(artifacts): regenerate conformance, cve_arena, release, and runtime_math result bundles

Regenerated suite-level result bundles after the fmemopen exact-
capacity truncate fix landed. The bundles are the deterministic JSON
and JSONL outputs of the conformance/CVE arena/release validation
pipelines — they are tracked artifacts that record the state of
the test corpus for each push, so refreshing them keeps snapshot
differential-diffs against main meaningful.

Touched families:

- tests/conformance/*.v1.json
    closure_sweep_report, conformance_coverage_snapshot,
    cross_report_consistency, fixture_pipeline, fixture_unit_tests,
    fuzz_harness_architecture, fuzz_membrane_validation,
    fuzz_phase1_targets, fuzz_phase2_targets, per_symbol_fixture_tests,
    perf_regression_prevention, reverse_round_contracts, stub_census,
    symbol_tiers_roadmap, symbol_universe_normalization,
    alien_cs_e2e_report / alien_cs_e2e_trace

- tests/cve_arena/results/
    Per-bd artifact_index.json / trace.jsonl + stderr.txt snapshots
    under bd-13ya, bd-146t, bd-15n.2, bd-18qq.4, bd-1f35, bd-1qy,
    bd-24b6, bd-24ug, bd-2xp3, bd-ahjd; plus aggregate family
    summaries: corpus_normalization, format_string_validation,
    hardened_assertions, heap_overflow_validation,
    integer_overflow_validation, paired_mode_evidence,
    uaf_validation, uaf_adversarial_detection.

- tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json

- tests/runtime_math/
    admission_gate_report, controller_ablation_report,
    controller_manifest.

Follows the same cadence as prior regeneration commits
(2b46a384, 0f4e74a1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
